source: BTD Mod Helper game data export

upgrades.name: Hot Shots
upgrades.description: Shoots superhot tacks that do extra damage and can pop Lead Bloons.

upgrades.name: Ring of Fire
upgrades.description: Damages many more Bloons with a deadly ring of flame instead of tacks.

upgrades.name: Inferno Ring
upgrades.description: Deadly inferno of flame roasts Bloons into oblivion.

upgrades.name: Long Range Tacks
upgrades.description: Tacks fly out further than normal.

upgrades.name: Super Range Tacks
upgrades.description: Even longer range tacks that can pop more Bloons.

upgrades.name: Blade Shooter
upgrades.description: Switches tacks out for ultra-sharp, high pierce blades that can shatter frozen Bloons.

upgrades.name: Blade Maelstrom
upgrades.description: Blade Maelstrom ability: Covers the area in a storm of blades.

upgrades.name: Super Maelstrom
upgrades.description: Even more powerful Maelstrom ability and lasts longer.

upgrades.name: More Tacks
upgrades.description: Shoots 10 tacks instead of 8, plus increases Ring of Fire damage.

upgrades.name: Even More Tacks
upgrades.description: Shoots out 12 tacks per shot and increases Ring of Fire damage further.

upgrades.name: Tack Sprayer
upgrades.description: Sprays out 16 higher pierce tacks per volley.
